name: wujie-vue3-micro-frontend-demo
description: Vue3 + Vite + Wujie micro frontend demo

scripts.install:all: npm i && npm run install:main && npm run install:app1 && npm run install:app2
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n main,app1,app2 -c blue,green,magenta "npm run start:main" "npm run start:app1" "npm run start:app2"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:main && npm run build:app1 && npm run build:app2

author: Your Name
